raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Arrival context","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Gives Elena a low-pressure opening to set context in her own words before anything specific is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reorg shift","name":"Since the reorg, what feels most different in your day-to-day?","description":"Surfaces the concrete ways the reorg has changed her work without assuming the change is negative.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Forum pullback","name":"What changed for you in the leadership forums?","description":"Lets her explain the shift in visible participation without framing it as a problem.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team touchpoints","name":"What feels different in your team interactions right now?","description":"Explores the quality of connection and presence in a way that invites specifics rather than a diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope fit","name":"What part of your current scope feels most solid to you?","description":"Helps separate what is working from what may be misaligned after the reorg.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"Where would a bit more support make the biggest difference right now?","description":"Surfaces the most useful form of manager help without forcing her to frame it as a complaint.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load pressure","name":"What part of your current load is hardest to keep in balance?","description":"Checks whether the strain is coming from calendar load, context switching, or something else in the setup.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority drift","name":"What are you choosing to put first this week?","description":"Clarifies current priorities and what is being intentionally left lower priority after the reorg.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Need from me","name":"What do you want me to do differently for you in the next couple of weeks?","description":"Invites a concrete ask for manager support that can be acted on quickly.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have changed by our next conversation?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a specific next move with a clear time horizon.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
